traps.name: inlineStr causes Excel repair
traps.cause: openpyxl writes inlineStr cells; Excel expects shared strings for some cell types
traps.fix: Call fix_inlinestr(str(out)) after pkg.write() in run.py pipeline

traps.name: OOXML dxf schema order violation
traps.cause: _patch_styles_dxf inserts <dxfs> block after </styleSheet> instead of between </cellStyles> and <tableStyles>
traps.fix: Insert dxfs between </cellStyles> and <tableStyles>, not at end of file

traps.name: openpyxl styles.xml incompatibility with dxfs
traps.symptom: Excel repair dialog even with correct dxfs position; COM automation fails
traps.cause: openpyxl writes attributes (<b val='1'/>, <numFmts count='0'/>, indexed colors, pivotButton='0', quotePrefix='0', hidden='0') that conflict with Excel parser when dxfs are present
traps.fix: Strip or rewrite problematic openpyxl attributes before CF patcher injection; or write clean styles.xml from scratch

traps.name: C:\ path hardcoded breaks CI
traps.symptom: Tests fail on non-Windows or different user paths
traps.cause: Hardcoded C:\Users\Cheex\Desktop\dev\Web Excel Triage in roster_parser.py
traps.fix: Use relative paths or env vars for input xlsx paths in tests

traps.name: C:\ path hardcoded in roster_log_review_queue tests
traps.symptom: Tests fail on CI or different machines
traps.cause: Hardcoded C:\ path in test_roster_log_review_queue.py fixture paths
traps.fix: Use relative paths or pytest fixtures for input xlsx paths

traps.name: web_excel_compatibility_rules has no __main__
traps.fix: Use the function directly: from triage.web_excel_compatibility_rules import inspect_web_excel_package

traps.name: Harness and launcher proofs are NOT_RUN
traps.symptom: sprint/roster-blank-shell-runtime-proof cannot complete harness_proof or launcher_proof
traps.cause: triage/harness/cli.py and scripts/harness.ps1 do not exist on origin/main
traps.fix: Create harness CLI and launcher script, or mark as NOT_RUN in sprint evidence

traps.name: COM automation fails on openpyxl+dxf files
traps.symptom: Open method of Workbooks class failed
traps.cause: Excel COM automation cannot open files generated by openpyxl when dxfs are present, even at correct schema position
traps.fix: Use Start-Process + Get-Process for detection instead of COM automation; or fix openpyxl styles.xml

traps.name: Repair prompt is stop-ship
traps.symptom: Any Excel repair dialog = artifact failed
traps.cause: By definition: if Excel repairs it, it is not accepted
traps.fix: Rebuild clean; do not bless repaired artifacts

sprint_rules.never_claim_higher: Do not claim higher proof level from lower
